footer.product_of: Pestify is a product of Pest - Free.

home.title: Run pest control like a modern operation.
home.subtitle: Pestify helps teams standardize service delivery, keep technicians aligned, and generate documentation ready for inspections and clients.
home.trial: Start with a 1-Month Free Trial. No commitment required.

features.title: Powerful features built for modern pest control operations.
features.subtitle: Pestify centralizes field workflows, compliance documentation, and team visibility into one structured system.
features.field_ops_desc: Standardize every visit with structured workflows and guided service steps.
features.property_desc: Maintain a complete history for each commercial or residential property.
features.compliance_desc: Be prepared for audits and regulatory inspections.
features.cta_desc: Access Pestify and modernize your pest control workflows.

pricing.title: Simple, scalable pricing.
pricing.subtitle: Choose a plan that fits your team size and operational needs.
pricing.trial: All plans include a 1-Month Free Trial. No commitment.
pricing.starter_desc: For small teams starting digital operations.
pricing.professional_desc: For growing pest control companies and more.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.subtitle: This policy explains how Pestify (Pest - Free) processes personal data on pestify.gr and the Pestify application.

terms.title: Terms of Use
terms.subtitle: These Terms govern your access to and use of Pestify.

cookies.title: Cookie Policy
cookies.subtitle: This Cookie Policy explains how Pestify (Pest – Free) uses cookies and similar technologies on pestify.gr.

consent.title: Cookies & measurement
consent.description: We use necessary cookies for security. With your consent, we use analytics (Google Analytics 4, Sentry) and marketing cookies (Google Ads conversion tracking) to measure performance and improve the service.
consent.necessary_desc: Required for security and basic functionality.
consent.analytics_desc: Helps us understand usage and fix issues (GA4, Sentry).
consent.marketing_desc: Helps us measure campaigns (Google Ads conversions).
